name: GOLFTEC Birmingham
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training facility focused on data-driven instruction and swing improvement. The company utilizes advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback on swings. Services include personalized lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions with coach-designed training plans. Their approach caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, aiming to accelerate improvement through technology and expert coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION provides precise swing feedback unavailable on traditional driving ranges
Personalized lesson plans based on data-driven swing analysis for targeted improvement
Expert PGA-certified coaches work as a team to ensure customer satisfaction and progress

food_and_drink.notes: No food or kitchen facilities mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as premium launch monitor technology for fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides club fitting services and sells golf clubs, but you may use your own clubs for lessons and practice.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of BYOB or food/drink service, so it appears outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator play times aren't specified, but the focus is on skill development rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about junior programs or kid-friendly amenities was found.
